channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [剧场版][CAST][公开] Anime News Network 20th Anniversary Sgt. Frog Film 公开 More Guest 声优阵容
item.description: Tomokazu Seki, Natsuki Hanae, Kōichi Yamadera, Keigo Satō, Yūsei Yagi, Suzanne, Rina Watanabe join cast ― The official website for Shin Gekijōban ☆ Keroro Gunsō Fukkatsu Shite Sokkō Chikyū Metsubō no... | 来源: ANN | 原文: 20th Anniversary Sgt. Frog Film Reveals More Guest Cast

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network U-NEXT Holdings Acquire GoHands 动画 Studio as 100%-Owned Subsidiary
item.description: Company already has U-Next, self-described as Japan's biggest streamer ― The multi-sector company U-NEXT Holdings announced on Monday that its board of directors decided to acquire the anime studio... | 来源: ANN | 原文: U-NEXT Holdings to Acquire GoHands Anime Studio as 100%-Owned Subsidiary
